title: P0-D legal / finance contract-aware baseline
purpose: Provide a minimal but executable before-and-after baseline for clause / obligation support and legal-finance contract-aware pack hardening without turning benchmark scaffolding into a new platform.
update_policy: Only update this manifest when the shipped scope for P0-D changes.
Do not overwrite historical QA evidence; benchmark scaffold records complement docs/04_qa_matrix.md.
Prefer revising seed cases over expanding into a full scoring platform during P0-D.

cases.title: Contract obligation redline escalation
cases.description: Document-centered contract review with unclear obligations, termination exposure, and missing approval trail.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need an internal contract-risk review on liability allocation, missing approval records, milestone obligations, and whether the current draft should be redlined, escalated, or paused before signing.
source_mix_summary: payment milestone and obligation tracker excerpt
notes: Should stay useful as the baseline case for clause / obligation support-bundle hardening.

cases.title: Financing covenant and cash pressure review
cases.description: Finance-heavy review where debt covenants, payment terms, and milestone obligations may change runway confidence.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a finance and legal review on covenant pressure, payment timing, investor obligations, and whether the company should accept the current financing terms before tightening cash discipline and approval logic.
source_mix_summary: cash runway and working capital note
board approval and obligation tracker excerpt
